The Court announces Tentative Ruling. ARGUED re: using VAFI as case law. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DANIEL BORNSTEIN's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is GRANTED. This action is barred by 1-year statute of limitations per Vafi v McCloskey (2011) 193 Cal.App.4th 874 and Lee v.
